revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 28 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 28 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦9月28日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（[[1331年]]_月_日） - 笠置山に蘢っていた[[後醍醐天皇]]が挙兵。鎌倉幕府が[[足利尊氏]]軍を指し向け、逃れた後醍醐天皇は翌日捕えられる * [[長禄]]元年（[[1457年]]_月_日） - 長禄に改元 * [[寛永]]6年（[[1629年]]_月_日） - [[徳川光圀]]が江戸小石川の水戸藩別邸に庭園・[[後楽園]]を完成させる
== 誕生日 == * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（[[1809年]]_月_日） - [[島津斉彬]]、[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（[[1867年]]_月_日） - [[平沼騏一郎]]、35代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1952年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[明応]]9年（[[1500年]]_月_日） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（* [[1442年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月27日 (旧暦)|9月27日]] 翌日[[9月29日 (旧暦)|9月29日]] - 前月[[8月28日 (旧暦)|8月28日]] 翌月[[10月28日 (旧暦)|10月28日]] *新暦[[9月28日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 忌日 == * [[明応]]9年（[[1500年]]_月_日） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（* [[1442年]]）

{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月27日 (旧暦)|9月27日]] 翌日[[9月29日 (旧暦)|9月29日]] - 前月[[8月28日 (旧暦)|8月28日]] 翌月[[10月28日 (旧暦)|10月28日]] *新暦[[9月28日]]

== できごと == * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1331年]][[10月30日]]） - 笠置山に籠っていた[[後醍醐天皇]]が挙兵。[[鎌倉幕府]]が[[足利尊氏]]軍を指し向け、逃れた後醍醐天皇は翌日捕えられる * [[長禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1457年]][[10月16日]]） - [[康正]]から長禄に[[改元]] * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[11月13日]]） - [[徳川頼房]]が江戸小石川の[[水戸藩]]別邸に[[庭園]]・[[後楽園]]を完成させる
== 誕生日 == * [[宝暦]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1757年]][[11月9日]]） - [[大槻玄沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（+ [[1827年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[11月5日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[10月28日]]） - [[横河民輔]]、[[建築家]]･[[実業家]]（+ [[1945年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[10月25日]]） - [[平沼騏一郎]]、35代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1952年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[明応]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1500年]][[10月21日]]） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（* [[1442年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|27|9|29|8|28|10|9|0928}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月28日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1331年]][[10月30日]]） - 笠置山に籠っていた[[後醍醐天皇]]が挙兵。[[鎌倉幕府]]が[[足利尊氏]]軍を指し向け、逃れた後醍醐天皇は翌日捕えられる * [[長禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1457年]][[10月16日]]） - [[康正]]から長禄に[[改元]] * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[11月13日]]） - [[徳川頼房]]が江戸小石川の[[水戸藩]]別邸に[[庭園]]・[[後楽園]]を完成させる
== 誕生日 == * [[宝暦]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1757年]][[11月9日]]） - [[大槻玄沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（+ [[1827年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[11月5日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[10月28日]]） - [[横河民輔]]、[[建築家]]･[[実業家]]（+ [[1945年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[10月25日]]） - [[平沼騏一郎]]、35代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1952年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[明応]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1500年]][[10月21日]]） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（* [[1442年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|27|9|29|8|28|10|9|0928}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]]

{{Lunar September}} '''Lunar September28日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1331年]][[10月30日]]） - 笠置山に籠っていた[[後醍醐天皇]]が挙兵。[[鎌倉幕府]]が[[足利尊氏]]軍を指し向け、逃れた後醍醐天皇は翌日捕えられる * [[長禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1457年]][[10月16日]]） - [[康正]]から長禄に[[改元]] * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[11月13日]]） - [[徳川頼房]]が江戸小石川の[[水戸藩]]別邸に[[庭園]]・[[後楽園]]を完成させる
== 誕生日 == * [[宝暦]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1757年]][[11月9日]]） - [[大槻玄沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（+ [[1827年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[11月5日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[10月28日]]） - [[横河民輔]]、[[建築家]]･[[実業家]]（+ [[1945年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[10月25日]]） - [[平沼騏一郎]]、35代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1952年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[明応]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1500年]][[10月21日]]） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（* [[1442年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|27|9|29|8|28|10|9|0928}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunar September]]

{{Lunar September}} '''Lunar September28日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1331年]][[10月30日]]） - 笠置山に籠っていた[[後醍醐天皇]]が挙兵。[[鎌倉幕府]]が[[足利尊氏]]軍を指し向け、逃れた後醍醐天皇は翌日捕えられる * [[長禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1457年]][[10月16日]]） - [[康正]]から長禄に[[改元]] * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[11月13日]]） - [[徳川頼房]]が江戸小石川の[[水戸藩]]別邸に[[庭園]]・[[後楽園]]を完成させる
== 誕生日 == * [[宝暦]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1757年]][[11月9日]]） - [[大槻玄沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（+ [[1827年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[11月5日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[10月28日]]） - [[横河民輔]]、[[建築家]]･[[実業家]]（+ [[1945年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[10月25日]]） - [[平沼騏一郎]]、35代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1952年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[明応]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1500年]][[10月21日]]） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（* [[1442年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|27|9|29|8|28|10|9|0928}}
[[Category:japanese Lunar Calendar]][[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunar September]]

revision.comment: idk what haoppened but removing and re-adding the template
Text replacement - "日'''は" to "--> is the Nth day of "
Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days
Text replacement - "六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]" to "六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]"
Text replacement - "旧暦}}" to "旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}"

== 誕生日 == * [[宝暦]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1757年]][[11月9日]]） - [[大槻玄沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（+ [[1827年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[11月5日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[10月28日]]） - [[横河民輔]]、[[建築家]]･[[実業家]]（+ [[1945年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[10月25日]]） - [[平沼騏一郎]]、35代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1952年]]）

revision.text:
{{Lunar September}} '''September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
<!--== {{Lunar September}} ''September 28'''<!--Lunar September28 is the Nth day of [[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
--> == Events == * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1331年]][[10月30日]]） - 笠置山に籠っていた[[後醍醐天皇]]が挙兵。[[鎌倉幕府]]が[[足利尊氏]]軍を指し向け、逃れた後醍醐天皇は翌日捕えられる * [[長禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1457年]][[10月16日]]） - [[康正]]から長禄に[[改元]] * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[11月13日]]） - [[徳川頼房]]が江戸小石川の[[水戸藩]]別邸に[[庭園]]・[[後楽園]]を完成させる
== Births == * [[宝暦]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1757年]][[11月9日]]） - [[大槻玄沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（+ [[1827年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[11月5日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[10月28日]]） - [[横河民輔]]、[[建築家]]･[[実業家]]（+ [[1945年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[10月25日]]） - [[平沼騏一郎]]、35代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1952年]]）
== Deaths == * [[明応]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1500年]][[10月21日]]） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（* [[1442年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|27|9|29|8|28|10|9|0928}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar September]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:赤口]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[Category:month category-September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)-month category]]

{{Lunar September}} '''September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
<!--== {{Lunar September}} ''September 28'''<!--Lunar September28 is the Nth day of [[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
--> == Events == * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1331年]][[10月30日]]） - 笠置山に籠っていた[[後醍醐天皇]]が挙兵。[[鎌倉幕府]]が[[足利尊氏]]軍を指し向け、逃れた後醍醐天皇は翌日捕えられる * [[長禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1457年]][[10月16日]]） - [[康正]]から長禄に[[改元]] * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[11月13日]]） - [[徳川頼房]]が江戸小石川の[[水戸藩]]別邸に[[庭園]]・[[後楽園]]を完成させる
== Births == * [[宝暦]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1757年]][[11月9日]]） - [[大槻玄沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（+ [[1827年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[11月5日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[10月28日]]） - [[横河民輔]]、[[建築家]]･[[実業家]]（+ [[1945年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[10月25日]]） - [[平沼騏一郎]]、35代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1952年]]）
== Deaths == * [[明応]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1500年]][[10月21日]]） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（* [[1442年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|27|9|29|8|28|10|9|0928}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar September]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:赤口]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[Category:month category-28 (Old Lunar Calendar)-month category]]

--> == Events == * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1331年]][[10月30日]]） - 笠置山に籠っていた[[後醍醐天皇]]が挙兵。[[鎌倉幕府]]が[[足利尊氏]]軍を指し向け、逃れた後醍醐天皇は翌日捕えられる * [[長禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1457年]][[10月16日]]） - [[康正]]から長禄に[[改元]] * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[11月13日]]） - [[徳川頼房]]が江戸小石川の[[水戸藩]]別邸に[[庭園]]・[[後楽園]]を完成させる
== Births == * [[宝暦]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1757年]][[11月9日]]） - [[大槻玄沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（+ [[1827年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[11月5日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[10月28日]]） - [[横河民輔]]、[[建築家]]･[[実業家]]（+ [[1945年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[10月25日]]） - [[平沼騏一郎]]、35代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1952年]]）
== Deaths == * [[明応]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1500年]][[10月21日]]） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（* [[1442年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|27|9|29|8|28|10|9|0928}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar September]] {{citation needed}}

<!--== {{Lunar September}} ''September 28'''<!--Lunar September28 is the Nth day of [[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の28日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
--> == Events == * [[元徳]]3年/[[元弘]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1331年]][[10月30日]]） - 笠置山に籠っていた[[後醍醐天皇]]が挙兵。[[鎌倉幕府]]が[[足利尊氏]]軍を指し向け、逃れた後醍醐天皇は翌日捕えられる * [[長禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1457年]][[10月16日]]） - [[康正]]から長禄に[[改元]] * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[11月13日]]） - [[徳川頼房]]が江戸小石川の[[水戸藩]]別邸に[[庭園]]・[[後楽園]]を完成させる
== Births == * [[宝暦]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1757年]][[11月9日]]） - [[大槻玄沢]]、[[蘭学者]]（+ [[1827年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1809年]][[11月5日]]） - [[島津斉彬]]、[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1858年]]） * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[10月28日]]） - [[横河民輔]]、[[建築家]]･[[実業家]]（+ [[1945年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[10月25日]]） - [[平沼騏一郎]]、35代[[内閣総理大臣]]（+ [[1952年]]）
== Deaths == * [[明応]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1500年]][[10月21日]]） - [[後土御門天皇]]、103代[[天皇]]（* [[1442年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|9|27|9|29|8|28|10|9|0928}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar September]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:赤口]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 28 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:new pages]]

revision.text:
[[sn:September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 28일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿八]] [[zh:九月廿八]] [[en:draft:September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}}3年/{{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}}） – The exiled Emperor {{ill|Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇}} took refuge in Kasagiyama; the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}}, and the emperor was captured the following day. * {{ill|Chōroku|ja|長禄}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1457|ja|1457}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}}） – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kōsei|ja|康正}} to {{ill|Chōroku|ja|長禄}}. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}6年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}}） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iefusa|ja|徳川頼房}} completed the construction of a garden (later known as {{ill|Kōrakuen|ja|後楽園}}) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa.
== Births == * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}7年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1757|ja|1757}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢}}, a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1827|ja|1827}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}6年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1809|ja|1809}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}}） – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|ja|島津斉彬}}, lord of the Satsuma Domain († {{ill|1858|ja|1858}}). * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1864|ja|1864}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}}） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔}}, an architect and entrepreneur († {{ill|1945|ja|1945}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}}） – {{ill|Hiranuma Kiichirō|ja|平沼騏一郎}}, who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiō|ja|明応}}9年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1500|ja|1500}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Gotomonomine|ja|後土御門天皇}}, the 103rd emperor (* {{ill|1442|ja|1442}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0928}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 28일]] [[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 28일]] [[Category:Lunar September]] {{citation needed}} {{citation needed}} [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[sn:September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 28일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿八]] [[zh:九月廿八]] [[en:draft:September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:Days 28 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 28일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿八]] [[zh:九月廿八]] [[en:draft:September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]

== Births == * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}7年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1757|ja|1757}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢}}, a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1827|ja|1827}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}6年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1809|ja|1809}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}}） – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|ja|島津斉彬}}, lord of the Satsuma Domain († {{ill|1858|ja|1858}}). * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1864|ja|1864}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}}） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔}}, an architect and entrepreneur († {{ill|1945|ja|1945}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}}） – {{ill|Hiranuma Kiichirō|ja|平沼騏一郎}}, who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiō|ja|明応}}9年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1500|ja|1500}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Gotomonomine|ja|後土御門天皇}}, the 103rd emperor (* {{ill|1442|ja|1442}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}}3年/{{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}}） – The exiled Emperor {{ill|Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇}} took refuge in Kasagiyama; the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}}, and the emperor was captured the following day. * {{ill|Chōroku|ja|長禄}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1457|ja|1457}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}}） – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kōsei|ja|康正}} to {{ill|Chōroku|ja|長禄}}. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}6年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}}） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iefusa|ja|徳川頼房}} completed the construction of a garden (later known as {{ill|Kōrakuen|ja|後楽園}}) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa.
== Births == * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}7年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1757|ja|1757}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢}}, a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1827|ja|1827}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}6年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1809|ja|1809}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}}） – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|ja|島津斉彬}}, lord of the Satsuma Domain († {{ill|1858|ja|1858}}). * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1864|ja|1864}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}}） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔}}, an architect and entrepreneur († {{ill|1945|ja|1945}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}}） – {{ill|Hiranuma Kiichirō|ja|平沼騏一郎}}, who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiō|ja|明応}}9年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1500|ja|1500}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Gotomonomine|ja|後土御門天皇}}, the 103rd emperor (* {{ill|1442|ja|1442}}).

[[sn:September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 28일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿八]] [[zh:九月廿八]] [[en:draft:September 28 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}}3年/{{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}}） – The exiled Emperor {{ill|Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇}} took refuge in Kasagiyama; the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}}, and the emperor was captured the following day. * {{ill|Chōroku|ja|長禄}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1457|ja|1457}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}}） – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kōsei|ja|康正}} to {{ill|Chōroku|ja|長禄}}. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}}） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iefusa|ja|徳川頼房}} completed the construction of a garden (later known as {{ill|Kōrakuen|ja|後楽園}}) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa.
== Births == * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}}7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1757|ja|1757}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢}}, a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1827|ja|1827}}). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}}6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1809|ja|1809}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}}） – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|ja|島津斉彬}}, lord of the Satsuma Domain († {{ill|1858|ja|1858}}). * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1864|ja|1864}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}}） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔}}, an architect and entrepreneur († {{ill|1945|ja|1945}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}}） – {{ill|Hiranuma Kiichirō|ja|平沼騏一郎}}, who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiō|ja|明応}}9th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1500|ja|1500}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Gotomonomine|ja|後土御門天皇}}, the 103rd emperor (* {{ill|1442|ja|1442}}).

[[sn:September 28 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 28일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿八]] [[zh:九月廿八]] [[en:draft:September 28 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3年/{{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ） – The exiled Emperor {{ill|Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇}} took refuge in Kasagiyama; the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} , and the emperor was captured the following day. * {{ill|Chōroku|ja|長禄}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1457|ja|1457}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ） – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kōsei|ja|康正}} to {{ill|Chōroku|ja|長禄}} . * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iefusa|ja|徳川頼房}} completed the construction of a garden (later known as {{ill|Kōrakuen|ja|後楽園}} ) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa.
== Births == * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1757|ja|1757}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1827|ja|1827}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1809|ja|1809}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|ja|島津斉彬}} , lord of the Satsuma Domain († {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} ). * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1864|ja|1864}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔}} , an architect and entrepreneur († {{ill|1945|ja|1945}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Hiranuma Kiichirō|ja|平沼騏一郎}} , who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiō|ja|明応}} 9th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1500|ja|1500}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Gotomonomine|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd emperor (* {{ill|1442|ja|1442}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0928}}

revision.comment: Fixing the qq replacement as it causes problems in a lot of pages
revision.text:
[[sn:September 28 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 28일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 28일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿八]] [[zh:九月廿八]] [[en:draft:September 28 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3年/{{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ） – The exiled Emperor {{ill|Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇}} took refuge in Kasagiyama; the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} , and the emperor was captured the following day. * {{ill|Chōroku|ja|長禄}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1457|ja|1457}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ） – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kōsei|ja|康正}} to {{ill|Chōroku|ja|長禄}} . * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iefusa|ja|徳川頼房}} completed the construction of a garden (later known as {{ill|Kōrakuen|ja|後楽園}} ) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa.
== Births == * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1757|ja|1757}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1827|ja|1827}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1809|ja|1809}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|ja|島津斉彬}} , lord of the Satsuma Domain († {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} ). * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1864|ja|1864}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔}} , an architect and entrepreneur († {{ill|1945|ja|1945}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Hiranuma Kiichirō|ja|平沼騏一郎}} , who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiō|ja|明応}} 9th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1500|ja|1500}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Gotomonomine|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd emperor (* {{ill|1442|ja|1442}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0928}}

== Births == * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1757|ja|1757}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1827|ja|1827}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1809|ja|1809}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|ja|島津斉彬}} , lord of the Satsuma Domain († {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} ). * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1864|ja|1864}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔}} , an architect and entrepreneur († {{ill|1945|ja|1945}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Hiranuma Kiichirō|ja|平沼騏一郎}} , who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiō|ja|明応}} 9th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1500|ja|1500}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Gotomonomine|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd emperor (* {{ill|1442|ja|1442}} ).

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿八]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Gentoku|ja|元徳}} 3rd year /{{ill|Genkō|ja|元弘}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1331|ja|1331}} {{ill|October 30|ja|10月30日}} ） – The exiled Emperor {{ill|Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇}} took refuge in Kasagiyama; the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} , and the emperor was captured the following day. * {{ill|Chōroku|ja|長禄}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1457|ja|1457}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ） – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kōsei|ja|康正}} to {{ill|Chōroku|ja|長禄}} . * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1629|ja|1629}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Iefusa|ja|徳川頼房}} completed the construction of a garden (later known as {{ill|Kōrakuen|ja|後楽園}} ) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa.
== Births == * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|Hōreki}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1757|ja|1757}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1827|ja|1827}} ). * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|lt=Bunka|lt_ja=文化}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1809|ja|1809}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ） – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|ja|島津斉彬}} , lord of the Satsuma Domain († {{ill|1858|ja|1858}} ). * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1864|ja|1864}} {{ill|October 28|ja|10月28日}} ） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔}} , an architect and entrepreneur († {{ill|1945|ja|1945}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}} ） – {{ill|Hiranuma Kiichirō|ja|平沼騏一郎}} , who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († {{ill|1952|ja|1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiō|ja|明応}} 9th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1500|ja|1500}} {{ill|October 21|ja|10月21日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Gotomonomine|ja|後土御門天皇}} , the 103rd emperor (* {{ill|1442|ja|1442}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0928}}
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿八]]
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿八]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 28일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月廿八]][[zh:九月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840059]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 28|qq=September 28}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year /[[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ） – The exiled Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Godaigo]] took refuge in Kasagiyama; the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} , and the emperor was captured the following day. * [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1457|1457]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōshō|Kōsei]] to [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] . * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Yorifusa|Tokugawa Iefusa]] completed the construction of a garden (later known as [[:en:Kōraku-en|Kōrakuen]] ) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa. == Births == * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1757|1757]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuki Genzawa|qq=|1=Ōtsuki Gentaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531075}} , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1827|1827]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]] , lord of the Satsuma Domain († [[:en:1858|1858]] ). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokogawa Minosuke|qq=|1=Tamisuke Yokogawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11542812}} , an architect and entrepreneur († [[:en:1945|1945]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Hiranuma Kiichirō|Hiranuma Kiichirō]] , who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Meiō|Meiō]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1500|1500]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Gotomonomine]] , the 103rd emperor (* [[:en:1442|1442]] ).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year /[[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ） – The exiled Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Godaigo]] took refuge in Kasagiyama; the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} , and the emperor was captured the following day. * [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1457|1457]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōshō|Kōsei]] to [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] . * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Yorifusa|Tokugawa Iefusa]] completed the construction of a garden (later known as [[:en:Kōraku-en|Kōrakuen]] ) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa. == Births == * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1757|1757]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuki Genzawa|1=Ōtsuki Gentaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531075}} , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1827|1827]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]] , lord of the Satsuma Domain († [[:en:1858|1858]] ). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokogawa Minosuke|1=Tamisuke Yokogawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11542812}} , an architect and entrepreneur († [[:en:1945|1945]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Hiranuma Kiichirō|Hiranuma Kiichirō]] , who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Meiō|Meiō]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1500|1500]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Gotomonomine]] , the 103rd emperor (* [[:en:1442|1442]] ).

the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} , and the emperor was captured the following day. * [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1457|1457]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōshō|Kōsei]] to [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] . * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Yorifusa|Tokugawa Iefusa]] completed the construction of a garden (later known as [[:en:Kōraku-en|Kōrakuen]] ) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa. == Births == * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1757|1757]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuki Genzawa|1=Ōtsuki Gentaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531075}} , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1827|1827]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]] , lord of the Satsuma Domain († [[:en:1858|1858]] ). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokogawa Minosuke|1=Tamisuke Yokogawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11542812}} , an architect and entrepreneur († [[:en:1945|1945]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Hiranuma Kiichirō|Hiranuma Kiichirō]] , who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Meiō|Meiō]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1500|1500]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Gotomonomine]] , the 103rd emperor (* [[:en:1442|1442]] ).

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year /[[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ） – The exiled Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Godaigo]] took refuge in Kasagiyama; == Deaths == * [[:en:Meiō|Meiō]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1500|1500]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Gotomonomine]] , the 103rd emperor (* [[:en:1442|1442]] ).

[[ar:September 28 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿八]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿八]] {{wikidata link|Q840059}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿八]][[zh:九月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840059]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 28|qq=September 28}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year /[[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ） – The exiled Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Godaigo]] took refuge in Kasagiyama; the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} , and the emperor was captured the following day. * [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1457|1457]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōshō|Kōsei]] to [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] . * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Yorifusa|Tokugawa Iefusa]] completed the construction of a garden (later known as [[:en:Kōraku-en|Kōrakuen]] ) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa. == Births == * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1757|1757]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuki Genzawa|1=Ōtsuki Gentaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531075}} , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1827|1827]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]] , lord of the Satsuma Domain († [[:en:1858|1858]] ). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokogawa Minosuke|1=Tamisuke Yokogawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11542812}} , an architect and entrepreneur († [[:en:1945|1945]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Hiranuma Kiichirō|Hiranuma Kiichirō]] , who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Meiō|Meiō]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1500|1500]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Gotomonomine]] , the 103rd emperor (* [[:en:1442|1442]] ).

the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} , and the emperor was captured the following day. * [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1457|1457]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōshō|Kōsei]] to [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] . * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Yorifusa|Tokugawa Iefusa]] completed the construction of a garden (later known as [[:en:Kōraku-en|Kōrakuen]] ) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa. == Births == * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1757|1757]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuki Genzawa|1=Ōtsuki Gentaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531075}} , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1827|1827]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]] , lord of the Satsuma Domain († [[:en:1858|1858]] ). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokogawa Minosuke|1=Tamisuke Yokogawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11542812}} , an architect and entrepreneur († [[:en:1945|1945]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Hiranuma Kiichirō|Hiranuma Kiichirō]] , who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Meiō|Meiō]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1500|1500]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Gotomonomine]] , the 103rd emperor (* [[:en:1442|1442]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿八]][[zh:九月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840059]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 28|qq=September 28}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year /[[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ） – The exiled Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Godaigo]] took refuge in Kasagiyama; the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} , and the emperor was captured the following day. * [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1457|1457]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōshō|Kōsei]] to [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] . * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Yorifusa|Tokugawa Iefusa]] completed the construction of a garden (later known as [[:en:Kōraku-en|Kōrakuen]] ) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa. == Births == * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1757|1757]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuki Genzawa|1=Ōtsuki Gentaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531075}} , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1827|1827]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]] , lord of the Satsuma Domain († [[:en:1858|1858]] ). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokogawa Minosuke|1=Tamisuke Yokogawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11542812}} , an architect and entrepreneur († [[:en:1945|1945]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Hiranuma Kiichirō|Hiranuma Kiichirō]] , who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Meiō|Meiō]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1500|1500]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Gotomonomine]] , the 103rd emperor (* [[:en:1442|1442]] ).

[[ar:September 28 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿八]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿八]] {{wikidata link|Q840059}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 28일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月廿八]][[zh:九月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 28일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月廿八]][[zh:九月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿八]][[zh:九月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840059]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 28|qq=September 28}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year /[[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ） – The exiled Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Godaigo]] took refuge in Kasagiyama; the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} , and the emperor was captured the following day. * [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1457|1457]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōshō|Kōsei]] to [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] . * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Yorifusa|Tokugawa Iefusa]] completed the construction of a garden (later known as [[:en:Kōraku-en|Kōrakuen]] ) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa. == Births == * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1757|1757]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuki Genzawa|1=Ōtsuki Gentaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531075}} , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1827|1827]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]] , lord of the Satsuma Domain († [[:en:1858|1858]] ). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokogawa Minosuke|1=Tamisuke Yokogawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11542812}} , an architect and entrepreneur († [[:en:1945|1945]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Hiranuma Kiichirō|Hiranuma Kiichirō]] , who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Meiō|Meiō]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1500|1500]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Gotomonomine]] , the 103rd emperor (* [[:en:1442|1442]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year /[[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]] ） – The exiled Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Godaigo]] took refuge in Kasagiyama; the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} , and the emperor was captured the following day. * [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1457|1457]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōshō|Kōsei]] to [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] . * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Yorifusa|Tokugawa Iefusa]] completed the construction of a garden (later known as [[:en:Kōraku-en|Kōrakuen]] ) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa. == Births == * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1757|1757]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuki Genzawa|1=Ōtsuki Gentaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531075}} , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1827|1827]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]] , lord of the Satsuma Domain († [[:en:1858|1858]] ). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokogawa Minosuke|1=Tamisuke Yokogawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11542812}} , an architect and entrepreneur († [[:en:1945|1945]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Hiranuma Kiichirō|Hiranuma Kiichirō]] , who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Meiō|Meiō]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1500|1500]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Gotomonomine]] , the 103rd emperor (* [[:en:1442|1442]] ).

the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} , and the emperor was captured the following day. * [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1457|1457]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kōshō|Kōsei]] to [[:en:Chōroku|Chōroku]] . * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ） – [[:en:Tokugawa Yorifusa|Tokugawa Iefusa]] completed the construction of a garden (later known as [[:en:Kōraku-en|Kōrakuen]] ) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa. == Births == * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 7th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1757|1757]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuki Genzawa|1=Ōtsuki Gentaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531075}} , a rangaku scholar († [[:en:1827|1827]] ). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1809|1809]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ） – [[:en:Shimazu Nariakira|Shimazu Nariakira]] , lord of the Satsuma Domain († [[:en:1858|1858]] ). * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:October 28|October 28]] ） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokogawa Minosuke|1=Tamisuke Yokogawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11542812}} , an architect and entrepreneur († [[:en:1945|1945]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]] ） – [[:en:Hiranuma Kiichirō|Hiranuma Kiichirō]] , who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († [[:en:1952|1952]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Meiō|Meiō]] 9th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1500|1500]] [[:en:October 21|October 21]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|Gotomonomine]] , the 103rd emperor (* [[:en:1442|1442]] ).

{{Not to be confused with|September 28|qq=September 28}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|WD=Q1327385|lt=Gentoku}} 3rd year /{{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1331|en|1331|WD=Q6000|lt=1331}} {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30}} ） – The exiled Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|WD=Q313942|lt=Godaigo}} took refuge in Kasagiyama; the Kamakura shogunate then turned against {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} , and the emperor was captured the following day. * {{ill|Chōroku|en|Chōroku|WD=Q1193524|lt=Chōroku}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1457|en|1457|WD=Q6518|lt=1457}} {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16}} ） – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kōshō|en|Kōshō|WD=Q1143364|lt=Kōsei}} to {{ill|Chōroku|en|Chōroku|WD=Q1193524|lt=Chōroku}} . * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1629|en|1629|WD=Q6847|lt=1629}} {{ill|November 13|en|November 13|WD=Q2984|lt=November 13}} ） – {{ill|Tokugawa Yorifusa|en|Tokugawa Yorifusa|WD=Q1133680|lt=Tokugawa Iefusa}} completed the construction of a garden (later known as {{ill|Kōraku-en|en|Kōraku-en|WD=Q1377689|lt=Kōrakuen}} ) at his Mito domain villa in Koishikawa. == Births == * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|WD=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1757|en|1757|WD=Q7635|lt=1757}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9}} ） – {{ill|Ōtsuki Genzawa|ja|大槻玄沢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuki Genzawa|1=Ōtsuki Gentaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6531075}} , a rangaku scholar († {{ill|1827|en|1827|WD=Q7008|lt=1827}} ). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1809|en|1809|WD=Q6919|lt=1809}} {{ill|November 5|en|November 5|WD=Q2993|lt=November 5}} ） – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|en|Shimazu Nariakira|WD=Q1143856|lt=Shimazu Nariakira}} , lord of the Satsuma Domain († {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}} ). * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|WD=Q1325419|lt=Genji}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|WD=Q7704|lt=1864}} {{ill|October 28|en|October 28|WD=Q2952|lt=October 28}} ） – {{ill|Yokogawa Minosuke|ja|横河民輔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokogawa Minosuke|1=Tamisuke Yokogawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11542812}} , an architect and entrepreneur († {{ill|1945|en|1945|WD=Q5240|lt=1945}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} {{ill|October 25|en|October 25|WD=Q2954|lt=October 25}} ） – {{ill|Hiranuma Kiichirō|en|Hiranuma Kiichirō|WD=Q379996|lt=Hiranuma Kiichirō}} , who later served as Prime Minister for the 35th time († {{ill|1952|en|1952|WD=Q5272|lt=1952}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiō|en|Meiō|WD=Q1193841|lt=Meiō}} 9th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1500|en|1500|WD=Q6126|lt=1500}} {{ill|October 21|en|October 21|WD=Q2960|lt=October 21}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|en|Emperor Go-Tsuchimikado|WD=Q380623|lt=Gotomonomine}} , the 103rd emperor (* {{ill|1442|en|1442|WD=Q6411|lt=1442}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0928|qq=}}

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} .
